desc: DetectionFindExternalUnitLocationFromEnvelopeCommand — ribbon wrapper over the envelope analyser MCP.
summary: DetectionFindExternalUnitLocationFromEnvelopeCommand — ribbon wrapper over the envelope analyser MCP.
usecase: Positioning hint for external plant unit.
precondition: Active doc; linked architecture or host roof/floor elements present.
postcondition: No mutation; tracker records ranked candidate list.
logictree:
1) Delegate to DetectionFindExternalUnitLocationFromEnvelope.GetAll(doc, noise_buffer_mm).
2) Tracker output + TaskDialog on Human path.

preprompts: Analysing envelope for external plant unit locations…
successprompts: Ranked envelope candidates in tracker output.
